templates.name: Paper plugin (basic)
templates.description: Paper plugin with a sample listener — the simplest scaffold beyond the bare embedded stub.

templates.name: Paper plugin with MockBukkit tests
templates.description: Paper plugin including listener + command + a JUnit/MockBukkit lifecycle harness driven by `pluggy test`.

templates.name: Paper plugin using Adventure components
templates.description: Paper plugin that messages players via Adventure `Component`s. Includes a MockBukkit test for the command handler.

templates.name: Folia plugin using region schedulers
templates.description: Folia plugin demonstrating `getRegionScheduler()` / `getAsyncScheduler()` — the API that replaces Bukkit's BukkitScheduler on Folia.

templates.name: Velocity proxy plugin
templates.description: Velocity proxy plugin with `@Inject` lifecycle, server-switch listener, and a Brigadier-registered command.

templates.name: BungeeCord proxy plugin
templates.description: BungeeCord plugin with a `PostLoginEvent` listener and a registered Command — the Bungee equivalent of the velocity-proxy template.

templates.name: Sponge plugin (basic)
templates.description: SpongeVanilla plugin with `@Plugin` lifecycle, a join listener, and a Brigadier-parameterized `/hello` command.
